use_cases: Primary action buttons in leather-themed or vintage aesthetic designs requiring tactile realism
E-commerce product purchase buttons needing rustic or artisanal styling
Gaming or lifestyle app interfaces with leather-inspired visual language
ai_summary: A skeuomorphic leather-textured button component featuring radial gradient patterns that simulate real leather grain, with inset shadows creating depth and dimension. The component includes standard hover (lift effect) and active (press down) transitions with disabled state handling. Styled with warm brown tones (#8B4513 to #CD853F) and wheat-colored text with text shadow for embossed appearance.
